description_long: This object is a long, straight sword with a double-edged blade and a pointed tip, reminiscent of a European longsword. The blade is metallic, dark in color, and appears to have a subtle texture, possibly from forging or wear. The crossguard is straight and simple, extending horizontally to protect the wielder's hand. The handle is cylindrical, matching the dark tone of the blade, and ends in a rounded pommel. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative elements, giving the sword a utilitarian and functional appearance. The overall design suggests durability and effectiveness for cutting and thrusting.
description: A long, straight, double-edged sword with a dark metallic blade, simple crossguard, and cylindrical handle. The design is utilitarian and lacks ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and the crossguard's extension.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the blade, crossguard, and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and the crossguard.
attribute_handle_design: straight, cylindrical, dark, minimal texture, rounded pommel
